name: bash-action
description: Run shell commands on agent lifecycle events. Supports the ACP exit-code-2 contract for blocking PreToolUse calls.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Command
x-meta.help: Shell command run via /bin/sh -c. Receives PERSONALCLAW_HOOK_EVENT + PERSONALCLAW_HOOK_CONTEXT env vars and the event JSON on STDIN. Exit code 2 blocks a PreToolUse call.
